text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, April 05. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's a big step. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've noted the plans. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Putting together our grocery list. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning a street block party soon. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
